title: Bright & spacious apartment in quiet and exclusive Östermalm for 4 persons

cleaning.instructions:
Bedroom: 
☐ Strip beds and remove used linens and put in designated laundry bag 
☐ Wash and replace fresh sheets, pillowcases, duvet covers 
☐ Check mattress protector and pillows 
☐ Make bed to company standard 
☐ Dust all surfaces (nightstands, lamps, headboards) 
☐ Wipe mirrors and glass
☐ Clean under bed and furniture 
☐ Vacuum/mop floors 
☐ Empty trash bins 
☐ Check closets (remove left items, hangers aligned) 

Bathroom(s): 
☐ Clean and disinfect toilet (inside & outside) 
☐ Clean sink & faucet 
☐ Scrub shower/bathtub and tiles 
☐ Clean mirrors and glass 
☐ Replace towels and bath mats and put used in designated laundry bag 
☐ Refill toiletries (soap, shampoo, toilet paper) 
☐ Empty trash 
☐ Mop floors 

Kitchen:
☐ Clean and disinfect countertops 
☐ Clean sink and faucet 
☐ Wash and put away dishes 
☐ Clean inside & outside of fridge 
☐ Clean microwave (inside & outside) 
☐ Clean oven/stovetop 
☐ Wipe cabinets and handles 
☐ Empty trash 
☐ Refill supplies (dish soap, sponge, paper towels) 
☐ Sweep and mop floor 

Living / Dining Area: 
☐ Dust all surfaces (tables, shelves, décor) 
☐ Clean TV, remote controls, electronics 
☐ Wipe light switches and door handles 
☐ Vacuum sofas, cushions, rugs 
☐ Check under cushions for debris 
☐ Arrange furniture neatly 
☐ Vacuum/mop floors 
☐ Empty trash 

Entryway / Hallways:
☐ Clean front door and handles 
☐ Wipe walls for marks 
☐ Clean mirrors or artwork 
☐ Sweep/mop floors 
☐ Check welcome mat

publicDescription.summary: Well-designed apartment, centrally located on Valhallavägen. Subway station located very close, transporting you to the Old Town, Central Station or Stureplan in ~5 minutes. The area offers the best of both worlds: quiet proximity to parks and nature trails, alongside easy access to the city's vibrant café, dining, and shopping scene. At 59 square meters, the space is ideal for one or up to four travelers seeking a comfortable and convenient base for exploring Stockholm, whether for a business trip, studies, or a city break.
publicDescription.space: This bright and welcoming living area features a comfortable lounge space with a sofa and a dining set for four. The sofa conveniently transforms into a double bed. A lovely balcony, accessible directly from this room, offers a relaxing outdoor spot. The modern, functional kitchen is equipped with an oven, cooktop, microwave, and a combined refrigerator-freezer, providing plenty of storage and all the essentials for preparing meals at home. The tranquil bedroom, which faces a peaceful courtyard, includes a spacious double bed and extensive storage. The fully-tiled bathroom is fitted with a shower, toilet, and basin. For added convenience, a shared laundry room with a washer-dryer is accessible in the building.
publicDescription.access:
The entire apartment is yours to enjoy
Free portable Wi-Fi – stay connected wherever you go
Bed linen and towels
Hairdryer
Complimentary toiletries
Iron and ironing board
publicDescription.neighborhood: Experience the best of Stockholm in Östermalm – a harmonious blend of sophistication and calm. Stroll from your quiet street to world-class museums, scenic waterfront promenades, and a fantastic selection of cafés and restaurants. It's the perfect base for a refined yet relaxed city stay. Östermalm is the most prestigious area of Stockholm.
publicDescription.notes: To maintain good relations with our neighbors, we strictly observe quiet hours between 10:00 PM and 7:00 AM. Please keep noise to a minimum during this period. For the comfort and safety of all, this is a completely non-smoking property. This prohibition includes cigarettes, e-cigarettes, and vaping devices, and applies to the interior, all balconies, and entryways. Bringing a pet will result in an additional cleaning fee and may lead to termination of your stay.

checkOutInstructions: Please make sure that the trash bins are emptied, kitchen stoves and lights are turned off. I hope you have enjoyed your stay!
lockCode:
To locate your apartment, find your unit number on the top corner of the apartment door (As shown by the yellow arrows on attached picture).
At least 24 hours before check in you will be sent instructions via SMS to download the app "Unloc". To open the apartment door you will be able to use bluetooth via the app to gain access. To lock the door from the outside, simply push the handle upwards.

title: Clean studio with a perfect mix of city & nature!
Cozy studio apartment in Östermalm

publicDescription.summary: This cozy 26 sqm studio apartment is perfectly located on Valhallavägen, just steps from Tekniska Högskolan metro station. You’ll enjoy easy access to beautiful parks, shopping, bars, cafés, and restaurants. The apartment is ideal for solo travelers or couples, offering a comfortable and convenient stay in an excellent location.
publicDescription.space: Please note: This property is part of a multi-unit building. All units are designed to be identical and offer the same level of comfort, style, and amenities. Minor differences may occur, such as room size, wall colors, or interior details. Regardless of the unit assigned, you will enjoy the same high standard and full access to all amenities. The studio features a living area with a comfortable sofa, a TV, and a 180 cm wide bed. There is also a small table where you can enjoy meals or a cup of coffee. The fully equipped kitchen includes a stove, oven, fridge, freezer, coffee maker, and kettle—everything you need to prepare meals at home. The bathroom is equipped with a toilet, sink, and a walk-in shower for your convenience.
publicDescription.access:
Entire apartment for private use
Fast Wi-Fi
Hotel-quality bed linen and towels
Hairdryer
Complimentary toiletries
Free coffee and tea
Iron and ironing board
publicDescription.neighborhood:
Östermalm
Prestigious and central: Östermalm is one of Stockholm’s most exclusive neighborhoods, known for its elegant architecture, wide boulevards, and close proximity to the city center.

Culture, dining & shopping: The area offers upscale boutiques, excellent restaurants, stylish cafés, and vibrant nightlife, creating a refined and lively urban atmosphere.

Green spaces & waterfront: Surrounded by beautiful parks like Djurgården and scenic waterfront promenades, Östermalm perfectly combines city living with nature.
publicDescription.notes:
Guest policy: Only registered and confirmed guests are allowed on the property. The host reserves the right to cancel a booking in case of misconduct, disruptive behavior, or violation of house rules.

Rental policy: The apartment may only be rented and used for short-term leisure stays and is not intended for permanent residence. Guests must follow the check-in and check-out times provided by the host unless otherwise agreed in advance. Parties and unauthorized gatherings are strictly prohibited, and only the guests listed in the booking are allowed in the apartment. Filming or recording is not permitted without prior written approval from the host.

Damage & deep cleaning: Guests are responsible for maintaining the apartment and its facilities in good condition. Any damage, breakage, or loss caused by the guest—whether accidental or intentional—will be the guest’s full financial responsibility. The host reserves the right to charge the registered credit card for repairs, replacements, or lost items. A deep cleaning fee of SEK 2,500 will apply if excessive cleaning is required due to guest actions.

Internet access: Complimentary Wi-Fi is provided. The property is not responsible for any interruptions or security risks related to internet usage.

Quiet hours: Quiet hours are strictly enforced between 10:00 PM and 7:00 AM to maintain a peaceful environment for residents and neighbors. The property is equipped with a disturbance detection system that monitors excessive noise or smoke. Failure to comply may result in penalties, additional fees, or eviction.

No smoking: The property is strictly non-smoking, including e-cigarettes and vaping devices. Smoking is prohibited inside the apartment, on balconies, and near the entrance. Violations may result in additional cleaning fees and possible eviction without refund.

Forgotten items: The property is not responsible for any lost or forgotten belongings.

No illegal activities: The property must not be used for illegal activities, including prostitution or drug use. Any violation will result in immediate eviction, involvement of law enforcement, and forfeiture of any refund.
